__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB
__inputs.description: Datasource InfluxDB (Flux) ekzistuese në CT104 — org fie, bucket lab

panels.title: B0 (flat) vs B1 (tri-shtresor) — kumulativ, që nga nisja e run-it

targets.query:
from(bucket: "lab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "b0_shadow" and r.source == "total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "b0" or r._field == "b1")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.description: Dy vija kumulative që nga nisja e live run-it (18 Korrik 2026). Pjerrësia e B0 duhet të jetë dukshëm më e madhe se e B1 — ky është validimi vizual i -83.9% të simulimit historik.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "lab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "b0_shadow" and r.source == "total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "b0" or r._field == "b1")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: if r.b0 > 0.0 then 100.0 * (1.0 - float(v: r.b1) / float(v: r.b0)) else 0.0 }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "lab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "b0_shadow" and r.source == "total" and r._field == "b0")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "lab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "b0_shadow" and r.source == "total" and r._field == "b1")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

panels.title: Cikli i fundit (log gjallëse)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "lab")
  |> range(start: -6h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "b0_shadow" and r.source == "total" and r._field == "b0")
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: int(v: r._time) / 1000000 }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

panels.description: Nëse s'ka përditësuar në >2h, shërbimi mund të ketë rënë — kontrollo `systemctl status b0-counter` te CT104.

panels.title: Ndarje sipas burimit (L1/L2/L3) — kumulativ

targets.query:
from(bucket: "lab")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "b0_shadow" and r.source != "total")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "b0" or r._field == "b1")
  |> group(columns: ["source", "_field"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> cumulativeSum()
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "source", "_field"])

panels.description: L2=InfluxDB threshold, L1=Uptime Kuma, L3=PVE/PBS tasks. Krahaso peshën relative me gjetjen historike (L3 dominon me 499/507 sinjale).
